codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses both prior non-blocking findings. Adjacent same-type merges now preserve separator characters from normalized page text (with safe fallback behavior), and text indexing now ignores empty items when selecting previous items for separator insertion. Regression tests directly cover the reported failure modes.

summary: Pass. Reviewed transcript skeleton, prior review context, and commit 2438e6d diff for fix-engine-nonblocking. The implementation and new tests align with the requested non-blocking fixes, and no remaining/new issues were identified in scope.
